member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler
member.summary: Dc Printer interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.Initialize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Set the list of corners per domain that their instances will be targeted to do vmin normalizing.
member.param: the name of the callback as registered.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.Initialize(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Set the list of corners per domain that their instances will be targeted to do vmin normalizing.
member.param: the name of the callback as registered.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.IsCurrentInstanceTargeted(System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String,System.Int32}[])
member.summary: Checks if the current instance is targeted to do vmin normalizing.
member.returns: true if the instance is targeted and not a part of the exclude list. else, false.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.Enable
member.summary: Enable the Vmin normalizing feature for the TP.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.Disable
member.summary: Disable the Vmin normalizing feature for the TP.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.IsEnabled
member.summary: Checks if the normalizing feature is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.Normalize(Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Normalize the vmin using the callback.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.IVminNormalizingHandler.GetVminNormalizeParametersContainer
member.summary: Get an empty object of VminNormalizeParameters.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters
member.summary: VminNormalizeParametes class.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.PowerDomainCornerFlow
member.summary: Gets or sets Domain.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.Temperatures
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dts list of values, needs to be as the number of cores.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.Vmins
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vmin to normalize.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.StepsForCurrentInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the steps for current instance.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.StepSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the Resolution of the steps.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizeParameters.InitializePowerDomainCornerFlow(System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String,System.Int32}[])
member.summary: Initialize the PowerDomainCornerFlows.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizerStorage
member.summary: VminNormalizerStorage class.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizerStorage.InstancesToIgnore
member.summary: Gets or sets the list containing the instance's names to ignore targeting.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizerStorage.CornersPerDomains
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of corners per domains to target- with VminNormalizing feature.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizerStorage.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether VminNormalizing feature is enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.VminNormalizer.VminNormalizerStorage.CallbackName
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback name.
